Nextbase
About
Sign inGet Started
Open Source Starter Kit

Build your SaaS product faster

A production-ready Next.js + Supabase starter with authentication, database, UI components, and everything you need.

Get Started View on GitHub

Everything you need

Production-ready features included out of the box

Type-Safe
End-to-end TypeScript with auto-generated Supabase types. Catch errors at compile time.
Modern Stack
Next.js 16, TypeScript, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS — the best tools for modern web development.
UI Components
Beautiful components built with Radix UI and Tailwind. Accessible and customizable.
Authentication
Magic links, OAuth providers, and email/password with protected routes — all pre-configured.
Database Ready
Supabase with Row Level Security, migrations, and seed data — ready for production.
Fast Deployment
Deploy to Vercel in minutes. CI/CD, preview deployments, and automatic type generation included.

Ready to build?

Start with a solid foundation and ship faster.

Start for free
